articles.title: GitHub will join Microsoft’s CoreAI division with departure of CEO Thomas Dohmke
articles.description: Microsoft will bring GitHub into its CoreAI division with the announcement this morning that GitHub CEO Thomas Dohmke will be stepping down as the leader of the widely used software development platform and code repository. GitHub has operated largely on its own since its acquisition by Microsoft in 2018 for $7.5 billion. However, with the rise of the GitHub Copilot coding assistant and the broader growth of AI-powered software development, GitHub’s fortunes are increasingly tied to those of its parent company. Dohmke said in a post Monday morning that he will remain with GitHub through the end of 2025 to… Read More
articles.author: Todd Bishop
articles.image_path: src/frontend/assets/images/articles/github-will-join-microsofts-coreai-group-with-departure-of-ceo-thomas-dohmke_GitHub will join Microsoft’s CoreAI division with departure of CEO Thomas Dohmke

articles.title: Amazon Devices & Services Achieves Major Step Toward Zero-Touch Manufacturing With NVIDIA AI and Digital Twins
articles.description: Using NVIDIA digital twin technologies, Amazon Devices & Services is powering big leaps in manufacturing with a new physical AI software solution. Deployed this month at an Amazon Devices facility, the company’s innovative, simulation-first approach for zero-touch manufacturing trains robotic arms to inspect diverse devices for product-quality auditing and integrate new goods into the production Read Article

With this, the team will generate one billion single-cell datapoints, mapping one million drug-patient interactions, a scale previously...
